title: Jotai
description: Jotai documents overview material for Jotai in the language domain. It is classified as an entity page for the library class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights primitive Atom 사용하기, primitive Atom -> 읽기 전용 Atom, and 쓰기 전용 Atom -> primitive Atom, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include react, state, language, and javascript, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / javascript / jotai / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
